baseSepolia.executorPlaceholder: 0x<LayerZero executor from official metadata or selected executor>
baseSepolia.enforcedReceiveOptionsPlaceholder: <lzReceive gas/value bytes; minimum local test gas 200000>

monadTestnet.executorPlaceholder: 0x<LayerZero executor from official metadata or selected executor>
monadTestnet.enforcedReceiveOptionsPlaceholder: <lzReceive gas/value bytes; minimum local test gas 200000>

validationChecklist: owner/admin is nonzero and controlled by approved governance
endpointV2 equals the exact chain endpoint and has runtime bytecode
local chainId/EID and remote chainId/EID match official metadata
trusted peers are the reciprocal deployed adapters, not application contracts or EOAs
local/remote applications are the reviewed Glyph app handlers/router/vault for that chain
messengerPolicyHash binds DVN set, executor, confirmations, receive libraries, enforced options, peers, endpoints, message version, and proof kind
LayerZero adapter proof is labeled AUTHENTICATED_ADAPTER, never LIGHT_CLIENT_VERIFIED
no private keys, RPC secrets, broadcast flags, or funded accounts are included in this template
